speaker: Manfred Weber
text: The way to beat populism is for the center to deliver serious answers on voter concerns — particularly on migration — rather than maintaining a 'left-leaning' stance; socialists' refusal to back the safe third country concept feeds extremism Europe-wide.
context: Cited the European Parliament vote that week on safe third country rules and the 80% reduction in illegal Mediterranean migration achieved with Meloni.

addressed_in_artifacts.voice_name: Plato son of Ariston, of the deme Collytus — though when I write I withdraw my name from the page; you will hear me only through Socrates and the others.
